visuals.title: Name Services in Distributed Systems
visuals.description: Animated visual showing name services concepts: purpose, name spaces, resolution methods, DNS example, and key properties
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="400" data-topic-id="name-services-introduction">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bgGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E8EAF6"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#C5CAE9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 8 3, 0 6" fill="#3949AB"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowGreen" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 8 3, 0 6" fill="#00695C"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowOrange" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="8" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 8 3, 0 6" fill="#E65100"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="420" height="400" fill="url(#bgGrad)" rx="12"/>

  <!-- G1: Title "Name Services" with underline (0.3s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Name Services provide the mapping between human-readable names and machine addresses in distributed systems.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="0.3s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="210" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Name Services in Distributed Systems</text>
    <line x1="90" y1="36" x2="330" y2="36" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- G2: Purpose - Map names to addresses (1.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="The purpose of name services is to map human-readable names to addresses or resources, similar to how DNS works for the internet.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="1.5s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Purpose</text>
    <text x="18" y="73" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#333">Map human-readable names to addresses/resources</text>
    <!-- Flow: Name -> Name Service -> Address -->
    <rect x="30" y="82" width="72" height="26" rx="5" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="66" y="99" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#fff">Name</text>
    <line x1="102" y1="95" x2="140" y2="95" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <rect x="142" y="82" width="100" height="26" rx="5" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="192" y="99" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#fff">Name Service</text>
    <line x1="242" y1="95" x2="278" y2="95" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrowGreen)"/>
    <rect x="280" y="82" width="72" height="26" rx="5" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="316" y="99" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" fill="#fff">Address</text>
    <text x="390" y="99" text-anchor="end" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="#666" font-style="italic">e.g. DNS</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G3: Name Space - Flat vs Hierarchical (3.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Name spaces can be flat, using unique IDs at the same level, or hierarchical, using a tree structure like DNS with dot-separated domains.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="3.0s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="18" y="130" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Name Space</text>
    <!-- Flat namespace -->
    <rect x="18" y="138" width="170" height="68" rx="6" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="103" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Flat (Unique IDs)</text>
    <rect x="30" y="160" width="48" height="18" rx="3" fill="#00695C" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.7"/>
    <text x="54" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">ID-001</text>
    <rect x="84" y="160" width="48" height="18" rx="3" fill="#00695C" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.7"/>
    <text x="108" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">ID-002</text>
    <rect x="138" y="160" width="44" height="18" rx="3" fill="#00695C" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="0.7"/>
    <text x="160" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">ID-003</text>
    <text x="103" y="198" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#555">No hierarchy, all at same level</text>
    <!-- Hierarchical namespace -->
    <rect x="202" y="138" width="200" height="68" rx="6" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="302" y="152" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">Hierarchical (Tree)</text>
    <!-- Tree: root -> .com, .org; .com -> google -> mail -->
    <circle cx="302" cy="163" r="6" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="314" y="166" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">root</text>
    <line x1="302" y1="169" x2="268" y2="180" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="302" y1="169" x2="338" y2="180" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="268" cy="183" r="6" fill="#3949AB" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="268" y="196" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">.com</text>
    <circle cx="338" cy="183" r="6" fill="#3949AB" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="338" y="196" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">.org</text>
    <line x1="268" y1="189" x2="252" y2="200" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <line x1="268" y1="189" x2="286" y2="200" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="0.8"/>
    <text x="252" y="208" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#3949AB">google</text>
    <text x="286" y="208" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="6" fill="#3949AB">mail</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G4: Name Resolution - Iterative vs Recursive (4.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Name resolution can be iterative, where the client contacts each server in turn, or recursive, where each server contacts the next server on behalf of the client.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="4.5s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="18" y="224" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Name Resolution</text>
    <!-- Iterative -->
    <rect x="18" y="232" width="190" height="56" rx="6" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="113" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#E65100">Iterative</text>
    <rect x="28" y="252" width="36" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="46" y="263" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">Client</text>
    <line x1="64" y1="257" x2="82" y2="257" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <rect x="84" y="249" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="96" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S1</text>
    <line x1="64" y1="263" x2="118" y2="270" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <rect x="120" y="264" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="132" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S2</text>
    <line x1="64" y1="265" x2="154" y2="270" stroke="#E65100" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowOrange)"/>
    <rect x="156" y="264" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#E65100" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="168" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S3</text>
    <text x="113" y="296" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#555" font-style="italic">Client contacts each server</text>
    <!-- Recursive -->
    <rect x="220" y="232" width="182" height="56" rx="6" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="311" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="9" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Recursive</text>
    <rect x="230" y="256" width="36" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="248" y="267" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">Client</text>
    <line x1="266" y1="264" x2="282" y2="264" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="284" y="256" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="296" y="267" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S1</text>
    <line x1="308" y1="264" x2="324" y2="264" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="326" y="256" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="338" y="267" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S2</text>
    <line x1="350" y1="264" x2="366" y2="264" stroke="#C62828" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="368" y="256" width="24" height="16" rx="3" fill="#C62828" fill-opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="380" y="267" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#fff">S3</text>
    <text x="311" y="284" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#555" font-style="italic">Server forwards on behalf</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G5: DNS as Example (6.0s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="DNS is the prime example of a name service. It uses a hierarchy from root to TLD to domain to subdomain, with record types like A, AAAA, CNAME, and MX.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="6.0s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="18" y="312" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3949AB">DNS Example</text>
    <!-- DNS hierarchy: Root -> TLD -> Domain -> Subdomain -->
    <rect x="18" y="319" width="242" height="36" rx="5" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1"/>
    <rect x="24" y="325" width="34" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="41" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Root</text>
    <line x1="58" y1="336" x2="68" y2="336" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <rect x="70" y="325" width="42" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3949AB" fill-opacity="0.8"/>
    <text x="91" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">TLD</text>
    <text x="91" y="356" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#3949AB">.com .org</text>
    <line x1="112" y1="336" x2="122" y2="336" stroke="#3949AB" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <rect x="124" y="325" width="58" height="22" rx="4" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="153" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Domain</text>
    <text x="153" y="356" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#00695C">google.com</text>
    <line x1="182" y1="336" x2="192" y2="336" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1" marker-end="url(#arrowGreen)"/>
    <rect x="194" y="325" width="58" height="22" rx="4" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="223" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Subdomain</text>
    <text x="223" y="356" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="7" fill="#E65100">mail.google</text>
    <!-- Record types -->
    <rect x="272" y="319" width="132" height="36" rx="5" fill="#fff" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke="#00695C" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="338" y="331" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#00695C">Record Types</text>
    <text x="296" y="345" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#3949AB">A</text>
    <text x="313" y="345" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#00695C">AAAA</text>
    <text x="344" y="345" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#E65100">CNAME</text>
    <text x="382" y="345" font-family="monospace" font-size="8" fill="#C62828">MX</text>
  </g>

  <!-- G6: Properties (7.5s) -->
  <g opacity="0" data-narration="Key properties of name services include scalability to handle growing networks, availability through replication, caching for performance, and consistency considerations across replicas.">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" begin="7.5s" dur="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
    <text x="18" y="378" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#C62828">Key Properties</text>
    <!-- Property badges -->
    <rect x="18" y="383" width="82" height="16" rx="8" fill="#3949AB"/>
    <text x="59" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Scalability</text>
    <rect x="106" y="383" width="100" height="16" rx="8" fill="#00695C"/>
    <text x="156" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Availability (Repl.)</text>
    <rect x="212" y="383" width="68" height="16" rx="8" fill="#E65100"/>
    <text x="246" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Caching</text>
    <rect x="286" y="383" width="82" height="16" rx="8" fill="#C62828"/>
    <text x="327" y="394" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="8" fill="#fff">Consistency</text>
  </g>
</svg>
